---
title: "Capstone"
description: "Capstone project on modeling the relationship between socioeconomic factors and premature deaths at a county level in the United States for SURE 2024 at CMU" 
date: July 2024
about:
  template: solana
  image: cover.jpeg
  links:
    - icon: laptop
      text: Slides
      href: https://www.stat.cmu.edu/cmsac/sure/2024/showcase/premature_deaths/slides.pdf
    - icon: file
      text: Poster
      href: https://www.stat.cmu.edu/cmsac/sure/2024/showcase/premature_deaths/poster.pdf 
    - icon: pencil 
      text: Report
---

i want to change stuff
